remember: Identify the causes and effects of e-waste generation
Recall the types of e-waste and their disposal methods
List the benefits of e-waste recycling
understand: Explain the importance of e-waste management in terms of environmental impact and health risks
Describe the role of individuals, organizations, and governments in e-waste management
Discuss the challenges faced in e-waste management
apply: Design a plan for reducing e-waste generation in a personal or organizational setting
Develop strategies for the safe disposal of e-waste
Propose methods for recovering valuable materials from e-waste
analyze: Compare the environmental impacts of different e-waste disposal methods
Evaluate the effectiveness of e-waste management policies and programs
Assess the economic benefits of e-waste recycling

ncert_objectives: Students will understand the causes and effects of e-waste generation and its impact on the environment.
Students will be able to identify the types of e-waste, their characteristics, and disposal methods.
Students will learn about the importance of e-waste recycling and its benefits.
board_exam_objectives: Identify the causes of e-waste generation and its impact on the environment.
Explain the importance of e-waste recycling and its benefits.
Discuss the role of individuals, organizations, and governments in e-waste management.
